systemSettings.title: System Settings
systemSettings.loginScreenDesc: Change the titles displayed on the login page and sidebar. Applied to all languages.
systemSettings.searchModeDesc: Select the server search input mode for data grids
systemSettings.gridDescription: Toggle grid features per user. Changes are applied to all pages immediately after saving.

grid.rowNumberDesc: Show row number (No.) column on the left side of the grid
grid.columnPinningDesc: Allow pinning columns to left or right
grid.animationDesc: Apply animation effects when sorting/filtering rows
grid.tooltipDesc: Show full cell content as tooltip on hover
grid.quickFilterDesc: Show a global search input in the toolbar
grid.csvExportDesc: Show CSV download button in the pagination bar
grid.textSelectionDesc: Allow selecting and copying text by dragging within cells
grid.autoFormatDesc: Automatically apply thousand separators to numeric columns
grid.conditionalStyleDesc: Display negative values in red for numeric columns
grid.totalRowDesc: Show automatic sum of numeric columns at the bottom
grid.totalRowTypeDesc: Select how to display the total row for numeric columns
grid.clientPaginationDesc: Paginate data on the client side
grid.columnFilterDesc: Show checkbox filter in each column header

systemSettings.hybridWarning: Switching to HYBRID mode will require existing users to re-login.
systemSettings.hybridDescription: HYBRID mode: Validates both JWT and Redis sessions. Supports instant logout, forced session termination, and PIPA compliance. Automatically falls back to JWT Only if Redis is unavailable.
systemSettings.cssDescription: Modifying CSS variables will preview changes immediately. Saved changes will persist on next visit.

css.fontSmDesc: Badge, hint, auxiliary text, grid cell

uiSettings.title: UI Settings
uiSettings.description: Customize layout, fonts, colors, grid, sidebar, and button styles. Click ↺ to restore defaults.
